about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Connecting international markets with Chile and Paraguay

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: To facilitate access to international products for individuals and businesses in Chile and Paraguay, offering reliable, fast, and fairly priced shipping services. We believe borders should not be a barrier to accessing what you need.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the leading international logistics company for Chile and Paraguay, recognized for our technological innovation, transparency, and commitment to customer satisfaction.

about.storyTitle: We were born to shorten distances between the world and South America
about.storyP1: We started as a Miami mailbox service for friends and family who needed to receive products from the United States in Chile. Over time, demand grew and we expanded our operation to Paraguay and to imports from China for businesses.
about.storyP2: Today we manage thousands of shipments per year with a dedicated team in Miami, Santiago and Asuncion. Our commitment remains the same: a close, transparent and reliable service.
about.storyCheck1: Operational team in Miami, Chile and Paraguay

timeline.title: Our Services
timeline.subtitle: Three solutions designed to connect the world with Chile and Paraguay

step1.title: USA Shipping
step1.description: We receive your purchases at our Miami warehouse, consolidate, and ship to Chile or Paraguay with full tracking.

step2.title: China Imports
step2.description: We manage supplier sourcing, quality control, transport, and customs clearance for your business.

step3.title: Personal Shopping
step3.description: We buy for you at any store in the USA or China. No international card needed, no hassle.

step4.title: Delivery to Your Door
step4.description: Across all three services, we handle customs and coordinate direct delivery to your home or warehouse.

values.title: Our Values
values.transparencyDesc: Clear prices from the start, no hidden fees or surprises. You know exactly what you pay and why.
values.commitmentDesc: Every shipment matters. We treat your packages with the same care as if they were our own.
values.innovationDesc: We continuously improve our processes and technology to offer you a faster and more efficient experience.
values.trustDesc: Years of uninterrupted operations and thousands of satisfied customers back our work.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions about our services

q1.question: How does the Miami mailbox work?
q1.answer: We assign you an address at our Miami warehouse. You can use this address to receive your purchases from any store in the United States. Once they arrive, we consolidate and ship them to Chile or Paraguay.

q2.question: How long does shipping from USA take?
q2.answer: Air shipments from Miami to Chile or Paraguay take between 5 to 10 business days, depending on volume and selected shipping method. We dispatch weekly.

q3.question: Can I track my package?
q3.answer: Yes, we provide real-time tracking from the moment your package arrives at our warehouse until delivery at your address. You will receive updates via WhatsApp or email.

q4.question: What products are prohibited?
q4.answer: Hazardous materials, weapons, illegal substances, and perishable products cannot be shipped. For the complete list, contact us directly or check the customs regulations of your destination country.

q5.question: How do imports from China work?
q5.answer: We manage the entire process: from coordinating with the Chinese supplier, cargo consolidation, sea or air transport, customs procedures, and final delivery in Chile or Paraguay.

q6.question: What does the personal shopping service include?
q6.answer: We search for the product you need, verify the seller, make the purchase on your behalf, inspect quality, and ship it directly to your address. You just choose and we do the rest.

q7.question: How are shipping costs calculated?
q7.answer: Costs are calculated based on the weight and dimensions of the package. We consolidate your purchases to reduce volume and optimize pricing. Request a quote for an exact price.

q8.question: Do you handle customs procedures?
q8.answer: Yes, we take care of all documentation and customs management needed for your products to enter Chile or Paraguay without issues.

Shop at your favorite US store and use our address

We consolidate your packages to optimize costs
We dispatch weekly shipments to Chile or Paraguay
Receive at your doorstep with full tracking

air.cost: Higher cost per kg, lower volume

sea.title: Sea Freight

process.title: Import Process
process.subtitle: We guide you through every stage so your cargo arrives without setbacks

p1.title: Supplier Sourcing
p1.description: We identify and verify the best suppliers in China based on your product and budget.

p2.title: Negotiation and Purchase Order
p2.description: We negotiate prices, payment terms, and production timelines on your behalf.

p3.title: Quality Control
p3.description: We inspect the goods before shipment to ensure they meet your standards.

p4.title: International Shipping
p4.description: We coordinate air or sea transport with the best carriers and shipping lines.

p5.title: Customs Clearance
p5.description: We handle all documentation, permits, and customs procedures at destination.

p6.title: Final Delivery
p6.description: We coordinate ground transport to your warehouse or distribution point.

faq1.question: What is the minimum order to import?
faq1.answer: We do not require a strict minimum, but we recommend volumes that justify the international freight cost. We advise you to find the optimal point.

faq2.question: How do you verify supplier quality?
faq2.answer: We conduct prior audits, request samples, and coordinate factory inspections before shipment to ensure the product meets your expectations.

faq3.question: What documents do I need to import?
faq3.answer: Depending on the product and destination country, we handle commercial invoices, packing lists, certificates of origin, and special permits if required.

faq4.question: Do you offer financing or payment plans?
faq4.answer: We work with flexible payment schemes based on import volume. Contact us to evaluate the options available for your case.

quote.title: Get Your Quote
quote.subtitle: Calculate the estimated cost of your shipment in real time with live exchange rates
quote.shippingToMiamiHint: Domestic shipping cost within USA to our Miami warehouse. If unknown, you can leave it at 0.
quote.disclaimer: Values are approximate and may vary based on actual package dimensions. The chargeable weight is always the greater between actual weight and volumetric weight. For a final quote, contact us via WhatsApp.
quote.whatsappQuote: Hello, I just used the calculator. My estimated shipment is USD {total}, chargeable weight {weight} kg, {mode} mode. I would like to confirm the final price.
